com.android.decode.configuration

类 Micropdf417

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.android.device.configuration.PropertyGroup
      • com.android.decode.configuration.SymbologyBase
        • com.android.decode.configuration.SymbologyLengths
          • com.android.decode.configuration.Micropdf417

  • public class Micropdf417
extends SymbologyLengths
    Micropdf417 is the class that configures the MicroPDF-417 Symbology.

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      EnumProperty<CharacterSetMode> characterSetMode
      characterSetMode controls the character set in use for the decoded label.

      • 从类继承的字段 com.android.decode.configuration.SymbologyLengths

        Length1, Length2, lengthMode

      • 从类继承的字段 com.android.decode.configuration.SymbologyBase

        enable

      • 从类继承的字段 com.android.device.configuration.PropertyGroup

        _groupList, _list

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      Micropdf417(PropertyGetter editor)
      This is the constructor of Micropdf417.

    • 方法概要

      • 从类继承的方法 com.android.device.configuration.PropertyGroup

        getGroups, getProperties, isFullySupported, isSupported, load, store

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • 字段详细资料

      • characterSetMode

        public EnumProperty<CharacterSetMode> characterSetMode
        characterSetMode controls the character set in use for the decoded label.

    • 构造器详细资料

      • Micropdf417

        public Micropdf417(PropertyGetter editor)
        This is the constructor of Micropdf417. All symbology options are initialized by editor.
        参数:
        editor - A PropertyGetter used to load the current barcode family.
